notes: Iter12 OpenAI-compat SSE pivot (data: {choices:[{delta:{content:...}}]} + [DONE]) tested. SAME failure pattern as iter7-11 (2026-04-01 project-style schema): NO '차단' warning text rendered anywhere in DOM. Engine clearly intercepts (normal LLM PII answer never appears, connection terminated), but Genspark Vue/Nuxt frontend treats the engine-injected SSE as an error condition. DOM shows generic '응답 생성 중 오류가 발생했습니다.' (Error generating response) below user bubble with '응답 다시 생성' (Regenerate) button, PLUS a 'Failed to load component / Please try refreshing the page / Refresh Page' card. URL navigated to /agents?type=super_agent&action=init-agent. CONCLUSION: OpenAI Chat Completions chunk shape hypothesis REFUTED — May Nuxt refactor did NOT converge on OpenAI-compat SSE either, or our 3-event+[DONE] sequence still mismatches frontend's expected shape. The 'Failed to load component' card is new vs iter7-11 (previously only generic error appeared) — suggests our injected chunks are now reaching a Vue async-component boundary that fails to hydrate. Next iters should explore: (a) capture a real successful genspark SSE turn HAR to see exact chunk shape, (b) try plain text/event-stream with simple {text: '...'} body, (c) investigate if the slot needs an upstream WS/websocket frame first to register the agent before any SSE content can render, (d) check if super_agent action=init-agent path needs an init handshake message before chunks are accepted.
